pi_items.metadata_value: Federal Reserve Bank of St. Louis FRED database, via Hill et al. POE5
pi_items.verified_value: Federal Reserve Bank of St. Louis FRED database, via Hill et al. POE5

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on real-world US quarterly macroeconomic data (usa.gdt) from the FRED database via Hill et al. POE5. The required operation is to estimate an ARMA/ARIMA model using 'inf' as the dependent variable with parameters p=1, d=0, q=0 (an AR(1) model). The exact required output file path for the results is /home/ga/Documents/gretl_output/arma_results.txt.
